channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [RECLTD] REC Ltd Appoints Mohan Lal Kumawat as Executive Director (Finance-Bonds)
item.description:
REC Ltd, in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, has announced the appointment of Mohan Lal Kumawat as Executive Director (Finance-Bonds) with effect from April 9, 2026. Kumawat, a member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) and the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI), holds an MBA in Finance and has over 30 years of experience in organizational and financial planning, financial accounting, and corporate governance.

  • REC Ltd appoints Mohan Lal Kumawat as Executive Director (Finance-Bonds)
  • Kumawat is a member of ICAI and ICSI with an MBA in Finance
  • He has over 30 years of experience in financial planning and corporate governance
  • Appointment is in accordance with SEBI regulations
  • Effective from April 9, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: REC Ltd | Category: Appointments

item.title: [TIL] TIL Ltd's Rights Issue Committee Approves Allotment of 1,20,91,760 Partly Paid-up Equity Shares
item.description:
TIL Ltd's Rights Issue Committee has approved the allotment of 1,20,91,760 partly paid-up Equity Shares on Rights Basis to the eligible shareholders and/or renouncee(s) at ₹ 123.75 per Rights Equity Share, including a premium of ₹ 116.25 per Rights Equity Share. The balance amount is payable on Calls as defined in the Letter of Offer. This decision was made in consultation with the designated stock exchange, National Stock Exchange of India Limited, and pursuant to the finalization of the basis of allotment of the Issue. The Rights Issue is a furtherance of the Board of Directors' approval and the earlier meeting of the Rights Issue Committee approving the detailed terms of the Rights Issue and the Letter of Offer.

  • TIL Ltd's Rights Issue Committee approves the allotment of 1,20,91,760 partly paid-up Equity Shares.
  • The allotment is at ₹ 123.75 per Rights Equity Share, including a premium of ₹ 116.25 per Rights Equity Share.
  • The balance amount is payable on Calls as defined in the Letter of Offer.
  • The decision is made in consultation with the designated stock exchange, National Stock Exchange of India Limited.
  • The Rights Issue is a furtherance of the Board of Directors' approval and the earlier meeting of the Rights Issue Committee.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TIL LTD. | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [KSOLVES] Ksolves India Ltd to Approve Audited Financial Results on April 30, 2026
item.description:
Ksolves India Ltd has informed the BSE that its Board of Directors will meet on April 30, 2026 to consider and approve the Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for the fourth quarter and Financial Year ended March 31, 2026. The company has also announced the closure of the Trading Window for trading in the Company's equity shares from April 01, 2026 till May 03, 2026 in accordance with its Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading.

  • Ksolves India Ltd to approve Audited Standalone and Consolidated Financial Results for Q4 and FY ended March 31, 2026
  • Trading Window closed from April 01, 2026 till May 03, 2026 for trading in the Company's equity shares

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ksolves India Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SHIVAMAUTO] Shivam Autotech Ltd Clarifies Significant Share Price Movement
item.description:
Shivam Autotech Ltd has clarified a significant movement in its share price across exchanges. The company has consistently complied with all applicable provisions of Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, and has made all requisite disclosures in a timely, accurate, and transparent manner. There is no material information, event, or development that has been withheld by the company which could have a bearing on the price or volume behaviour of the company’s shares. The recent movement in the share price is purely market-driven and attributable to general market conditions.

  • Shivam Autotech Ltd clarifies significant share price movement
  • Company has consistently complied with all applicable provisions of SEBI regulations
  • No material information withheld by the company
  • Recent movement in share price is market-driven
  • Attributable to general market conditions

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SHIVAM AUTOTECH LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [NCML] Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd: Promoters Make No Encumbrance on Shares in FY 2025-2026
item.description:
Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd has disclosed under Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 that promoters and promoter group, including Bibhu Datta Panda, have not made any encumbrance on their shares in the company during the financial year ended 31st March 2026. This disclosure was made by Bibhu Datta Panda, Managing Director of Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd.

  • Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd promoters and promoter group made no encumbrance on their shares during the financial year ended 31st March 2026.
  • Bibhu Datta Panda, Managing Director of Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd, confirmed and declared the information on behalf of the promoter group.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nilachal Carbo Metalicks Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [INTLCONV*] International Conveyors Ltd Acquires Religare Enterprise Ltd for 3.13 Crore
item.description:
🔥 Trending

International Conveyors Limited has acquired 1,40,000 equity shares of Religare Enterprise Limited for a cash consideration of 3.13 Crore. Religare Enterprises Limited is a leading diversified financial services group in India, offering an integrated suite of financial services. The target entity had a turnover of 7354.236 Cr. in the financial year 2024-25.

  • International Conveyors Ltd acquires Religare Enterprise Ltd for 3.13 Crore
  • Acquisition of 1,40,000 equity shares
  • Religare Enterprises Limited is a leading diversified financial services group in India
  • Turnover of the target entity for the last three financial years: 7354.236 Cr., 6234.786 Cr., and 4676.456 Cr.
  • Acquisition done at arms length, not a related party transaction

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INTERNATIONAL CONVEYORS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [HILINFRA] Highway Infrastructure Ltd Debarred for Three Months by NHAI
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Highway Infrastructure Ltd has announced the withdrawal of the Letter of Acceptance (LOA) issued by the National Highway Authority of India (NHAI) for the operations of Venkatapalem Fee Plaza in Andhra Pradesh. As a result, NHAI has debarred the company, along with all its directors and owners, from the list of pre-qualified bidders for a period of three months. This decision was made pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Highway Infrastructure Ltd withdraws Letter of Acceptance (LOA) from NHAI for Venkatapalem Fee Plaza operations
  • NHAI debarred the company, directors, and owners from the list of pre-qualified bidders for three months
  • The debarment is due to the non-acceptance of the LOA by the company
  • The company is not eligible to participate in NHAI tenders for three months
  • This decision is in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Highway Infrastructure Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [DREAMFOLKS] Dreamfolks Services Ltd Maintains Transparency, Price Movement Market Driven
item.description:
Dreamfolks Services Ltd has provided clarification on the significant movement in the price of their security across exchanges. The company is committed to maintaining high standards of transparency and compliance in all disclosures. They disseminate all relevant information in accordance with the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company has already updated the stock exchanges with all material events and information as required under the SEBI LODR Regulations. The recent price movement is purely due to market conditions and is absolutely market driven.

  • Dreamfolks Services Ltd maintains high standards of transparency and compliance in disclosures
  • Company disseminates all relevant information as per SEBI LODR Regulations
  • All material events and information updated with stock exchanges
  • Recent price movement in Dreamfolks Services Ltd's security due to market conditions
  • Price movement is absolutely market driven

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dreamfolks Services Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [EPACKPEB] Epack Prefab Technologies Provides Clarification on Price Movement with No Pending Impactful Information
item.description:
Epack Prefab Technologies Ltd, in accordance with SEBI Listing Regulations, has confirmed that investors have the latest relevant information about the company. The company has no pending information or announcements other than those already disseminated to the exchange. The relevant information is available on the company's website.

  • Epack Prefab Technologies Ltd confirms compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations
  • No pending information or announcements that could impact the price behavior of the scrip
  • Relevant information available on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Epack Prefab Technologies Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PRESTIGE] Prestige Group Enters ₹9,000 Cr Residential Opportunity in Versova, Mumbai with ABIL Group
item.description:
Prestige Estates Projects Limited, one of India’s leading real estate developers, has entered into a joint venture with ABIL Group to develop a land parcel through Aaramnagar Realty LLP in Versova, Mumbai. The development spans approximately 6 acres and offers a total development potential of around 1.7 million square feet with an estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) of over ₹9,000 crores. The proposed development is envisaged as a premium residential project, catering to the growing demand for high-quality developments in Mumbai’s western suburbs.

  • Prestige Group and ABIL Group enter into a joint venture for a residential project in Versova, Mumbai.
  • The development spans approximately 6 acres with a total development potential of around 1.7 million square feet.
  • The project has an estimated Gross Development Value (GDV) of over ₹9,000 crores.
  • The proposed development is a premium residential project catering to the growing demand in Mumbai’s western suburbs.
  • Versova is a sought-after micro-market due to its strong social infrastructure, connectivity, and proximity to key commercial hubs.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PRESTIGE ESTATES PROJECTS LTD. | Category: Joint Ventures
